---
layout: cv
title: James' CV
---
# James Hom
Accountant in training

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="james@homfamily.com">james@homfamily.com</a>
<!-- | <a href="https://TRBITS.github.io/datascience_portfolio/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a> -->
| <a href="https://github.com/byuidatascience/datascience_portfolio/blob/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
</div>


## Currently

In education for accounting degree

## Education

`2020-2024`
__Vista del Lago, High School__

`2024-Now`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho__


<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
